candidate_lesson: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView reports zero confirming signals in the last 2h, the 75% sizing multiplier is too generous — internal-only MOMENTUM with no external confirmation should size at 50% or freeze until a TV signal appears.
testable_rule: if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count_2h == 0: sizing_multiplier = min(sizing_multiplier, 0.50)
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
